examples: Frontcourt: a team's offensive half of the court.
Outside the frontcourt , this team is pretty thin.
He provides tremendous depth to our frontcourt and we're happy to bring him back.
Early on, Utah's frontcourt duo of Jefferson and Millsap dominated, scoring 11 points each in the first quarter.
Left short-handed by a rash of frontcourt injuries, the Knicks are suddenly counting on Martin more than they ever imagined.
